name: glass_throat
reason: The planner output does not produce readable individual stage jobs. Stages 2-5 stack into one broad hill, so the cascade has a morph gesture but not a memorable injury.

stage_failures.actual_read: adds broad low/mid energy; not isolated enough to read as a formant
dominates into the same hill as stage 2
does not become the obvious injury; it is absorbed into the cascade
too broad to carve the glass shard
not the problem, but also not part of the identity
